title: astragalus subexcedens
intro: Astragalus subexcedens, also known as the lesser milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus subexcedens include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus subexcedens can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
